'''todhangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:huggie|huggie]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huggie|huggie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| todhangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:todhangithi|todhangithi]] || [[word:todhangiji|todhangiji]] || [[word:todhangishi|todhangishi]] || [[word:todhangiki|todhangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:todhanguthuthu|todhanguthuthu]] || [[word:todhangujuju|todhangujuju]] || [[word:todhangushushu|todhangushushu]] || [[word:todhangukuku|todhangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:todhanguthu|todhanguthu]] || [[word:todhanguju|todhanguju]] || [[word:todhangushu|todhangushu]] || [[word:todhanguku|todhanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:todhangufthuf|todhangufthuf]] || [[word:todhangufjuf|todhangufjuf]] || [[word:todhangufshuf|todhangufshuf]] || [[word:todhangufkuf|todhangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:todhangethe|todhangethe]] || [[word:todhangeje|todhangeje]] || [[word:todhangeshe|todhangeshe]] || [[word:todhangeke|todhangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:todhangothotho|todhangothotho]] || [[word:todhangojojo|todhangojojo]] || [[word:todhangoshosho|todhangoshosho]] || [[word:todhangokoko|todhangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:todhangotho|todhangotho]] || [[word:todhangojo|todhangojo]] || [[word:todhangosho|todhangosho]] || [[word:todhangoko|todhangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:todhangofthof|todhangofthof]] || [[word:todhangofjof|todhangofjof]] || [[word:todhangofshof|todhangofshof]] || [[word:todhangofkof|todhangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfthĂŻf|todhangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfjĂŻf|todhangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfshĂŻf|todhangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfkĂŻf|todhangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|todhangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|todhangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|todhangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|todhangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfthĂŻf|todhangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfjĂŻf|todhangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfshĂŻf|todhangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfkĂŻf|todhangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfthĂŻf|todhangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfjĂŻf|todhangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfshĂŻf|todhangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:todhangĂŻfkĂŻf|todhangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:todhangĂŠthĂŠ|todhangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:todhangĂŠjĂŠ|todhangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:todhangĂŠshĂŠ|todhangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:todhangĂŠkĂŠ|todhangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:todhangathatha|todhangathatha]] || [[word:todhangajaja|todhangajaja]] || [[word:todhangashasha|todhangashasha]] || [[word:todhangakaka|todhangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:todhangatha|todhangatha]] || [[word:todhangaja|todhangaja]] || [[word:todhangasha|todhangasha]] || [[word:todhangaka|todhangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:todhangafthaf|todhangafthaf]] || [[word:todhangafjaf|todhangafjaf]] || [[word:todhangafshaf|todhangafshaf]] || [[word:todhangafkaf|todhangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:todhangasha|todhangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:todhangshĂ«sha|todhangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:todhangrosha|todhangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:todhangmusha|todhangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:todhangyasha|todhangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotodhangnkshĂ«sha|gotodhangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotodhangnkrosha|gotodhangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotodhangnkmusha|gotodhangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotodhangnkyasha|gotodhangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:todhadhangasha|todhadhangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:todhadhangshĂ«sha|todhadhangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:todhadhangrosha|todhadhangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:todhadhangmusha|todhadhangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:todhadhangyasha|todhadhangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotodhadhangnkshĂ«sha|gotodhadhangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotodhadhangnkrosha|gotodhadhangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotodhadhangnkmusha|gotodhadhangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotodhadhangnkyasha|gotodhadhangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tedhĂŠngasha|tedhĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tedhĂŠngshĂ«sha|tedhĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tedhĂŠngrosha|tedhĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tedhĂŠngmusha|tedhĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tedhĂŠngyasha|tedhĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotedhĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|gotedhĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotedhĂŠngnkrosha|gotedhĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotedhĂŠngnkmusha|gotedhĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotedhĂŠngnkyasha|gotedhĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:todhfangasha|todhfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:todhfangshĂ«sha|todhfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:todhfangrosha|todhfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:todhfangmusha|todhfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:todhfangyasha|todhfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotodhfangnkshĂ«sha|gotodhfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotodhfangnkrosha|gotodhfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotodhfangnkmusha|gotodhfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotodhfangnkyasha|gotodhfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
